name: Ace of Cups
description: single golden chalice held by hand emerging from clouds, water flowing down into pool, white dove descending with wafer in beak, lotus flowers floating on water

name: Two of Cups
description: young man and woman exchanging two golden chalices, caduceus with lion head floating above between them, romantic scene, mountain background

name: Three of Cups
description: three women in flowing dresses raising chalices in celebration, dancing in joy, fruits and flowers around them, harvest scene

name: Four of Cups
description: young man sitting cross-legged under tree with three chalices on ground, fourth chalice offered by hand from cloud, contemplative mood

name: Five of Cups
description: figure in long black cloak looking down at three spilled chalices, two upright chalices behind, river and bridge to castle in distance

name: Six of Cups
description: child giving flower in chalice to younger child in old village courtyard, six chalices filled with white flowers around them, nostalgic warm scene

name: Seven of Cups
description: silhouette figure looking at seven floating chalices in clouds, each containing different vision treasure dragon castle laurel wreath jewels veiled figure snake

name: Eight of Cups
description: lone figure in red cloak walking away into mountains under crescent moon, eight chalices stacked on ground left behind, journey scene

name: Nine of Cups
description: satisfied man sitting with arms crossed in front of nine golden chalices arranged on curved table behind him, abundance feast

name: Ten of Cups
description: happy family with man woman and two dancing children under rainbow with ten chalices arranged in arch, cottage and stream nearby

name: Page of Cups
description: young page in flowery tunic by seashore holding golden chalice with fish emerging from inside, surprised expression, ocean waves background

name: Knight of Cups
description: knight in winged helmet on white horse offering golden chalice forward, calm gentle expression, river and mountains in background

name: Queen of Cups
description: elegant queen on stone throne by seashore holding ornate covered chalice with handles, contemplative mood, sea and rocks background

name: King of Cups
description: regal king on stone throne floating on stormy sea holding chalice and scepter, fish jumping from waves, ship in background

name: Ace of Wands
description: single flowering wooden staff held by hand emerging from clouds, fresh leaves sprouting from staff, mountain and castle in distance

name: Two of Wands
description: wealthy man on castle balcony holding small globe in one hand, two wands behind him one mounted on wall, looking out over sea and mountains

name: Three of Wands
description: merchant standing on cliff with back to viewer watching ships at sea, three wands planted in ground beside him, golden sunset

name: Four of Wands
description: two figures holding flower bouquets under garland canopy hanging between four wands, celebration scene with castle in background

name: Five of Wands
description: five young men in colorful tunics raising wooden staves in mock battle or competition, lively energetic scene

name: Six of Wands
description: victorious man riding white horse with laurel wreath on head and on raised wand, surrounded by five followers carrying wands, triumphal scene

name: Seven of Wands
description: man on hilltop defending against six wands rising up at him from below, holding seventh wand defensively, courage and challenge

name: Eight of Wands
description: eight wooden wands flying through clear sky over green countryside with river, swift motion energy

name: Nine of Wands
description: wounded warrior leaning on wand with bandaged head, eight wands standing as fence behind him, weary but determined

name: Ten of Wands
description: burdened figure carrying ten heavy wooden wands toward distant village, struggling under heavy load

name: Page of Wands
description: young page in feathered cap and yellow tunic holding tall flowering wand, standing in desert landscape with pyramids in distance

name: Knight of Wands
description: knight in armor with flame patterns on rearing horse holding flowering wand, desert background with pyramids, dynamic action pose

name: Queen of Wands
description: queen on stone throne with lion carvings holding sunflower and flowering wand, black cat at feet, sunny golden atmosphere

name: King of Wands
description: king on stone throne with lion and salamander symbols holding flowering wand and scepter, fiery confident expression, salamander at feet

name: Ace of Swords
description: single upright silver sword held by hand emerging from clouds, golden crown adorning sword tip with palm and olive branches, mountain peaks below

name: Two of Swords
description: blindfolded woman seated on stone bench holding two crossed swords against chest, crescent moon above, calm sea behind

name: Three of Swords
description: red heart pierced by three crossed silver swords against stormy gray cloudy sky with rain, sorrowful symbolic image

name: Four of Swords
description: stone effigy of knight lying on tomb in chapel with hands in prayer, three swords hanging on wall above and one beneath, peaceful rest

name: Five of Swords
description: smug victorious man holding three swords with two more on ground, two defeated figures walking away in distance, stormy sky

name: Six of Swords
description: ferryman in cloak rowing wooden boat with woman and child passengers across calm water, six swords standing upright in front of boat, journey scene

name: Seven of Swords
description: stealthy figure tiptoeing away from camp carrying five swords, two swords still planted in ground, sneaky cunning scene

name: Eight of Swords
description: blindfolded bound woman in red dress surrounded by eight swords planted in ground around her, gray castle on hill in background

name: Nine of Swords
description: person sitting up in bed with hands covering face in despair, nine swords hanging on wall behind them, dark night scene

name: Ten of Swords
description: fallen figure lying face down with ten swords pierced into back, dark stormy sky above with golden sunrise breaking through on horizon

name: Page of Swords
description: young page in tunic on hilltop holding upright sword with both hands, windswept hair and clouds, alert vigilant pose

name: Knight of Swords
description: knight in full armor on charging white horse holding sword high in attack pose, windswept dramatic action scene

name: Queen of Swords
description: stern queen on stone throne with butterfly motifs holding upright sword and gesturing forward, clouds and birds in sky behind

name: King of Swords
description: authoritative king on stone throne with butterfly and angel motifs holding upright sword, blue robe, stern wise expression

name: Ace of Pentacles
description: single golden pentacle coin with five-pointed star held by hand emerging from clouds, lush garden with arch of flowers and mountain in distance

name: Two of Pentacles
description: young man dancing while juggling two golden pentacles connected by infinity symbol ribbon, ships rising and falling on waves behind

name: Three of Pentacles
description: stonemason craftsman on bench with tools showing work to monk and architect with plans, three pentacles carved on cathedral arch above

name: Four of Pentacles
description: miser figure on stone seat holding one pentacle close to chest, one on head crown, two under feet, city background, hoarding pose

name: Five of Pentacles
description: two poor beggars one on crutches walking through snow past stained glass church window with five pentacles, hardship scene

name: Six of Pentacles
description: wealthy merchant in red robe giving coins to two kneeling beggars while holding scales of justice, six pentacles arranged above

name: Seven of Pentacles
description: tired farmer leaning on hoe contemplating seven pentacles growing on lush green vine plant, harvest contemplation

name: Eight of Pentacles
description: skilled craftsman sitting at workbench carving pentacle with hammer and chisel, six finished pentacles displayed on tree, one being worked on

name: Nine of Pentacles
description: elegant noblewoman in lush vineyard garden with hooded falcon on gloved hand, nine pentacles arranged in golden vines around her, prosperity

name: Ten of Pentacles
description: wealthy patriarch with two white dogs in courtyard archway with younger family members and child visible, ten pentacles arranged in tree of life pattern

name: Page of Pentacles
description: young page in green tunic in flowering meadow holding up single golden pentacle with both hands, studying it with focus, mountains in distance

name: Knight of Pentacles
description: armored knight on motionless heavy black workhorse holding single pentacle, plowed fields in background, steady patient pose

name: Queen of Pentacles
description: nurturing queen on stone throne in lush garden holding single pentacle in lap, surrounded by flowers and rabbit at feet, abundant scene

name: King of Pentacles
description: wealthy king on stone throne decorated with bull motifs holding single pentacle and scepter, grapevines and lush garden background, abundant prosperity
